hypothesis: If a patch-based Transformer trained with a joint L_S2S + λL_reconstruction loss across multiple concentration ratios can decompose IR spectra of mixtures into their pure-component spectra and identify the constituent molecules, then it will achieve high Top-1/5/10 accuracy and low MAE with high Tanimoto similarity on both synthetic and experimentally measured mixtures, validating that spectral alignment via reconstruction enables accurate mixture deconvolution.
